channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: Cognis: Context-Aware Memory for Conversational AI Agents
item.description: arXiv:2604.19771v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents lack persistent memory, causing conversations to reset each session and preventing personalization over time. We present Lyzr Cognis, a unified memory architecture for conversational AI agents that addresses this limitation through a multi-...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, context, memory, retrieval, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Super Apriel: One Checkpoint, Many Speeds
item.description: arXiv:2604.19877v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We release Super Apriel, a 15B-parameter supernet in which every decoder layer provides four trained mixer choices -- Full Attention (FA), Sliding Window Attention (SWA), Kimi Delta Attention (KDA), and Gated DeltaNet (GDN). A placement selects one mi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> fine-tuning, arxiv, release, context, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: excel-mcp-server - A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation
item.description: A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
item.description: Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: A Multi-Plant Machine Learning Framework for Emission Prediction, Forecasting, and Control in Cement Manufacturing
item.description: arXiv:2604.19903v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Cement production is among the largest contributors to industrial air pollution, emitting ~3 Mt NOx/year. The industry-standard mitigation approach, selective non-catalytic reduction (SNCR), exhibits low NH3 utilization efficiency, resulting in operat...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, framework, memory, model, product | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
